title: christella khasiana
intro: Christella khasiana, also known as the Khasi fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in various parts of Asia, particularly in the Himalayan region, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Christella khasiana include the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to enhance immune function and reduce oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, which is consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
